## Confections.Confection.effectiveUrls property

Gets effective URLs for the golden version. Convenience property equivalent to getEffectiveUrls(goldenVersion).

**Signature:**

```typescript
get effectiveUrls(): ReadonlyArray<ICategorizedUrl>;
```
